items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL VD500 VAG OBD-II Diagnosztikai eszköz:ANCEL VD500 is a specialized diagnostic tool designed for Volkswagen group vehicles - VW, Audi, Skoda and SEAT - equipped with 12V OBD-II connector. It allows not only basic engine diagnostics, but also access to specific VAG systems, such as ABS, transmission, SRS, SAS or electronic parking brake. With advanced features such as oil change interval reset or throttle adaptation, it provides users with options similar to professional service diagnostics. The ANCEL VD500 diagnostic device can also be used for common OBD-II functions on other brands of vehicles manufactured after 1996. The device is designed to be easy to use without complicated setup, so all you need to do is plug it in and start diagnosing. It supports all common OBD-II protocols and enables fast reading and erasing of error codes in a large number of VAG-specific control units.
